problem id: 3a61d8ad
category: bit_manipulation

rule: I OR NOT SHR(7)

examples:
  10101111 -> 11111111
  00001011 -> 11111111
  00000000 -> 11111111
  11011100 -> 11111110
  10111000 -> 11111110
  11111000 -> 11111110
  00101001 -> 11111111
  00100010 -> 11111111
  00010110 -> 11111111
  10010011 -> 11111111

query: 00111001
predicted answer: 11111111
